message:
perf(browser): P0-P2 fixes - GROUP BY, caching, allocations

- Replace JSON.stringify with String() in GROUP BY key building
- Move BM25 FTS index cache to file level (persists across executors)
- Add LRU eviction to hot-tier metadata cache (max 100 entries)
- Use Array.from for filter batch indices (single allocation)
- Add debug logging option for silent readColumnData failures
